kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Verify Login Error
Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'css:[data-test="error"]' contains text 'Epic sadface: Username and password do not match'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.arg: Epic sadface: Username and password do not match

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

kw.name: Verify Login Error
Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'css:[data-test="error"]' contains text 'Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.arg: Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user

Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'css:[data-test="error"]' contains text 'Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.'.

kw.arg: Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.
